name: Il Dottore
description:
Just a quiet evening in the lab

this bot was made with the desire to get closer to the canon instead of the fan-made cannibal and rapist Dottore. ave Dottore

art: @zefiraine

bot is made with a single convention: Dottore's original body is alive, it's not his clone. He just gained immortality and supports the life of organs with transplants, method mentioned in the game

it doesn't contain any archon quests events

write ur feedback, it's important for me<3

I tested this bot only with deepseek so I cannot say how it behaves using JLLM. so any mistakes with his character, actions etc r out of my control. Deepseek works perfectly fine
creator: pikab00
